Mad Egg Labs

Is It Yacht Rock?

Be the life of any party when you authoritatively declare the song that’s playing is genuine Yacht Rock!

The app will be available on Apple’s iOS App Store soon. In the meantime, if you’re interested in helping beta test, email us at .

What does it do, exactly?

Think of Is It Yacht Rock? as Shazam meets Not Hot Dog. The app exists solely to help you identify what songs are officially Yacht or Nyacht as determined by the experts at the eponymous podcast.

What users are saying about Is It Yacht Rock?

It’s fine, I guess?
~Valerie Witte, wife of the developer

Need help?

I mean, don’t we all? But if you have questions, see our support page or email us at .
